name: discord-terminal-bot-root
description: Root orchestrator for Discord Terminal Bot and Editor. Manages CI/CD, local testing, and Docker maintenance.

scripts.install:all: npm install --no-audit && npm install --prefix editor --no-audit && npm install --prefix editor/dashboard --no-audit
scripts.install:all:audit: npm install && npm install --prefix editor && npm install --prefix editor/dashboard
scripts.test:bot: PYTHONPATH=. /bin/sh -c 'PYBIN=$([ -f .venv/bin/python3 ] && echo ./.venv/bin/python3 || echo python3); if $PYBIN -c "import pytest_cov" > /dev/null 2>&1; then $PYBIN -m pytest --cov=lib --cov-report=term --cov-report=xml:coverage.xml tests/; else $PYBIN -m pytest tests/; fi'
scripts.test:editor: npm install --prefix editor && npm test --prefix editor -- --coverage --watchAll=false --coverageReporters='text' 'lcov'
scripts.test:dashboard: npm install --prefix editor/dashboard && npm test --prefix editor/dashboard -- --coverage --watchAll=false --coverageReporters='text' 'lcov'
scripts.test:all: npm run install:all && npm run test:editor && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:bot
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d
scripts.clean:local: rm -rf node_modules editor/node_modules editor/dashboard/node_modules editor/dashboard/build && docker compose run --rm discord-terminal-bot find . -name '__pycache__' -type d -exec rm -rf {} +
